meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Solve 'No Portfolio' with User Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Learn to build high-impact user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress clients and ship fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by demonstrating technical mastery through high-value micro-SaaS features. By engineering a sophisticated, frictionless user onboarding flow, you provide immediate, tangible value that proves your competence. Use Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, turning small projects into professional-grade assets.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, a client's deadline looming, and the crushing realization that your portfolio is empty. The market doesn't care about your potential; it cares about your ability to solve complex problems with elegant code. You are stuck in the 'no portfolio' loop where you need work to get work, but have no work to show.

But here is the secret: you don't need a massive app to land high-ticket clients. You need a singular, masterfully executed feature. A world-class user onboarding flow is the ultimate showcase—it proves you understand UX, state management, and user psychology. By building this, you aren't just writing code; you are building a bridge to your next contract.

steps.title: Architecting the State Machine
steps.description: Define the onboarding states (Welcome, Preference Selection, Value Realization) to ensure a linear, intuitive user path.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state machine configuration for a 3-step onboarding process, including persistent local storage hooks for user progress.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate the onboarding state machine logic in src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts'

steps.title: Building the UI Skeleton
steps.description: Rapidly scaffold the onboarding screens with a focus on high-fidelity layout and responsiveness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular Tailwind CSS component structure for an onboarding wizard that supports smooth transitions between steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the onboarding wizard UI components using Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion'

steps.title: Implementing Contextual Data Capture
steps.description: Create efficient data capture mechanisms that don't overwhelm the user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a schema and form handling logic for user preference capture that integrates with a generic API endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add Zod validation and React Hook Form integration to the onboarding preference form'

steps.title: Adding 'Aha!' Moment Triggers
steps.description: Integrate progress bars and micro-animations to increase conversion rates during the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a progress tracker and confetti success celebration logic to the final step of the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add Framer Motion exit animations and a progress bar component to the wizard'

steps.title: Final Polish and Performance Audit
steps.description: Ensure the flow is performant, accessible, and ready to be deployed as a portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current onboarding implementation for accessibility violations and performance bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Audit the onboarding flow for a11y compliance and bundle size optimization'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip' option in onboarding to respect power users who hate being walked through the basics.
Use mock API delays in development to test loading states; never let a user see a blank screen while your app initializes.
Store onboarding progress in localStorage to allow users to refresh their browser without losing their place in the wizard.
Track onboarding drop-off points with simple console logs or analytics events to identify friction in your UI.
Present your onboarding flow as a standalone case study; focus on the 'Why' behind your design choices, not just the code.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to Vercel, record a 60-second Loom video walking through the code, and add it to your GitHub portfolio as a featured project.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Build the features that make clients beg for your expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
